refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation communication quality such that packet loss does not exceed the customer-defined limit under agreed network conditions.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR clarifies the performance metric (packet loss) and ties it explicitly to customer-defined limits and network conditions, ensuring measurable and testable requirements.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure packet loss percentage during teleoperation sessions under controlled network conditions and verify compliance with customer-defined limits.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report communication quality status to relevant modules.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.
DP2: Use dedicated high-reliability network link with QoS prioritization.
DP3: Integrate real-time packet loss monitoring and dynamic adjustment algorithms.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.

potential_sources: Dependency on network link quality and configuration.
Interaction with safety alert systems if communication degrades.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically isolates communication quality management but requires interface with network link and safety services for alerts.

assumptions_risks: Assumes network conditions are within agreed parameters.
Risk of increased latency due to retransmissions affecting teleoperation responsiveness.
Risk that error correction may not fully compensate for severe network degradation.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding fallback mechanisms or multi-path communication to mitigate severe network issues.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Software and hardware components responsible for teleoperation communication management and control.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Interface for sending and receiving teleoperation data packets with network quality feedback.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Interface to report communication quality metrics and status to NGHE Solution.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Interface to notify Safety Services of communication degradation impacting safety.

module_containment_scores.notes: Broad scope but less focused containment of teleoperation communication logic.
Vehicle module primarily hardware; low containment relevance for communication protocol.
High containment score as communication protocol is core to teleoperation; low diffusion risk.
Receives alerts but does not implement communication protocol.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning DP to Teleoperation module centralizes communication quality management, minimizing diffusion and improving maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential interface complexity with Network Link and Safety Services.
Risk of module overload if Teleoperation module scope is not well managed.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts and consider splitting Teleoperation module if scope grows excessively.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP directly addresses the refined FR with clear mechanisms for packet loss control and monitoring.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk as DP is contained within Teleoperation module.
Interfaces with Network Link and Safety Services are well defined.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support Teleoperation as the best ownership candidate.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by monitoring packet loss metrics via Teleoperation interfaces and cross-checking with network conditions.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of responsibility to Teleoperation module with defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Add fallback communication strategies in DP to handle severe network degradation.
Clarify interface protocols and data formats for Network Link and SafetyAlert.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition sufficiently refines the FR, selects a viable DP, and assigns it to an appropriate IM with manageable risks and clear interfaces.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report communication quality status to relevant modules.

revise.why: In future levels, consider enhancing DP with fallback mechanisms and multi-path communication to improve robustness.

assumptions: Network conditions remain within agreed parameters.
Customer-defined packet loss limits are achievable with adaptive protocols.
open_risks: Severe network degradation beyond DP mitigation capabilities.
evidence_needed: Performance data of adaptive communication protocol under varying network conditions.
Verification results of packet loss monitoring accuracy.
